name: Unauthorized Keycard Entry
description: Keycard used 2:47 AM to bypass the south entrance. The card was registered to James Mitchell in facilities.

name: Vault Surveillance Gap
description: Cameras in Vault 4 went offline for six minutes during the incident window. No maintenance log was recorded.

name: James Mitchell Timeline
description: Facilities manager on duty. Badge logs show repeated entries before the incident and a late clock-out.

name: Safe Deposit Box Breach
description: Three boxes in Zone B were accessed and emptied. The locks showed no signs of forced entry.

name: Alarm System Disabled
description: Motion sensors in the vault wing were disabled at 2:40 AM and required supervisor access codes.

name: Cash Withdrawal Pattern
description: Suspicious ATM withdrawals by a low-level employee totaled $45,000 over the previous two weeks.

name: Vault Door Compromise
description: The vault door access logs show an unusual sequence during the same period as the breach.

name: Security Timeline
description: The timeline review highlights several alarms and access changes clustered around the incident.
